description_long: This is a stylized adult female figure with a slender build, depicted wearing a knee-length, short-sleeved dress with a high neckline and a necklace. The figure's arms are extended outward in a relaxed T-pose, and the hands are open with fingers slightly apart. The head is proportionally large, featuring a smooth, rounded hairstyle with a side part and a gentle wave. The legs are straight and the feet are clad in simple, low-heeled shoes. The overall appearance is clean and minimalist, with smooth surfaces and simplified anatomical details. The figure is designed to represent a typical urban pedestrian, suitable for use in city or street environments.
description: A stylized adult female figure in a knee-length dress and low-heeled shoes, with a rounded hairstyle and arms extended outward. The design is minimalist and clean, representing a typical urban pedestrian.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dress, necklace, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the straight posture of the body and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, dress, and both arms extended outward from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, hairstyle, and the straight alignment of the body and legs.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length short-sleeved dress with a high neckline and necklace
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended outward
attribute_hairstyle: short, rounded bob with a side part and gentle wave
